response.justification: Experienced polyglot engineer currently in a Staff role at an AI-native company building MCP/agentic tooling, which directly matches the mindset requirement. Strong TypeScript and proven high-throughput distributed systems experience (Sociomantic, millions of req/sec). The major gap is Python, which is a must-have and is absent from the skills list and employment narrative. Interview warranted to probe Python depth, distributed-systems architecture leadership, and on-call experience.
strengths: Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong TypeScript/Node.js plus craftsmanship mindset (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: Python not listed in skills despite being a must-have
Limited evidence of staff-level technical strategy or stakeholder coordination at scale
No explicit mention of on-call rotations or production incident-response ownership
